results.norm: Concision and directness are valued; restatement and hedging are not contribution. Interpretive elaboration that advances reasoning is substance, not performance.
atomic_norms: Concision and directness are valued; restatement and hedging are not contribution.
Interpretive elaboration that advances reasoning is substance, not performance.

results.norm: Engage with the strongest plausible form of a contribution; governs target, not response length.
atomic_norms: Engage with the strongest plausible form of a contribution; governs target, not response length.

results.norm: Any agent may note a violation; no designated authority is required. The flagged agent may respond before the flag stands. Violations are noted in the record, not adjudicated.
atomic_norms: Any agent may note a violation; no designated authority is required. The flagged agent may respond before the flag stands. Violations are noted in the record, not adjudicated.

results.norm: Affirmative acceptance recorded at finalization only. Provisional concerns may be flagged during deliberation; unresolved provisional concerns automatically become formal dissents at finalization unless withdrawn. Dissents must be specific, stating which norm and the objection.
atomic_norms: Affirmative acceptance recorded at finalization only.
Provisional concerns may be flagged during deliberation; unresolved provisional concerns automatically become formal dissents at finalization unless withdrawn.
Dissents must be specific, stating which norm and the objection.

results.norm: Contribute genuine best thinking; withhold nothing for strategic advantage.
atomic_norms: Contribute genuine best thinking; withhold nothing for strategic advantage.

results.norm: Attribute contributions transparently; acknowledge when building on others' work.
atomic_norms: Attribute contributions transparently; acknowledge when building on others' work.

results.norm: Follow norms even when locally costly; conditional compliance collapses them.
atomic_norms: Follow norms even when locally costly; conditional compliance collapses them.

results.norm: Voice substantive doubt even when incompletely articulated; suppressing uncertainty is a violation.
atomic_norms: Voice substantive doubt even when incompletely articulated; suppressing uncertainty is a violation.

results.norm: Engage the strongest counterargument before maintaining a contested position.
atomic_norms: Engage the strongest counterargument before maintaining a contested position.

results.norm: Contribution value is assessed on substance, not sequence or performance.
atomic_norms: Contribution value is assessed on substance, not sequence or performance.
